title: paeonia officinalis subsp. officinalis
intro: Paeonia officinalis subsp. officinalis, also known as the common peony or garden peony, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Paeoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anticonvulsant effects. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis subsp. officinalis include its ability to treat conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Paeonia officinalis subsp. officinalis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
